subject: (no subject)
body:
I'm coming back to ny tom and will be in ny all week going to europe following week to meet w/david about I correct site..now Sir David..he was knighted in this yrs honours list and then back to NY Fri 25 until Feb 4th when I go to Panama on a science expedition dive for 5 days and then back to NY..just thought you might like my plans..what are you doing? Will I see you next week? - am in Mustique going to St Vincent later to leave tom..




Thx

G
